text:
The Jelly Syndrome Child's Head (, Zerī-shō-ji no Tōbu) is a collectible body part. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 67 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

At the Sengi Guild, its agent manages to find three job offers that match Kurapika's request. One of the offers involves a flesh collector seeking the rare item. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The Jelly Syndrome Child's Head is not mentioned in the 1999 anime adaptation.
